daemon.start_error:
[Daemon] Failed to start daemon: %v
Please make sure the daemon is not already running.
daemon.start_success: [Daemon] Daemon started. You can chat with your Lobster after a moment!
daemon.stop_success: [Daemon] Daemon stopped. Thank you for playing with your Lobster!
daemon.status_running: [Daemon] Daemon is running. View logs at %s
daemon.status_not_running: [Daemon] Daemon is not running. Delete PID files in %s to reset, or run 'manboster reset'. Error: %v
daemon.status_error:
[Daemon] Failed to get daemon PID file: %v
The daemon may not be running.
daemon.no_config: [Daemon] No configuration file found. Please run the setup wizard first.
